_note: Concept-quiz category registry. ONE source of truth for the loader and content authoring. Each language shows the 12 SHARED categories plus its ONE language-specific category (13 total). 'file' is the JSON filename (without extension) under shared/ or by_language/<lang>/. Order here is the order categories appear in the UI. Difficulty levels used across items: easy (freshman) and medium (sophomore).

shared_categories.label: Syntax
shared_categories.blurb: Intros, printing, and basic program shape.

shared_categories.label: Strings
shared_categories.blurb: Text, indexing, and common string operations.

shared_categories.label: Algorithm Problems
shared_categories.blurb: Drag code lines into the correct order (Parsons).

shared_categories.label: Debug
shared_categories.blurb: Find and fix common beginner bugs.
